scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:website" "npm run dev:visitor-tracker" "npm run dev:unicorns-unite" "npm run dev:creator" "npm run dev:space-pups" "npm run dev:ai-rp-studio" --names "website,auth,unicorns,creator,space-pups,ai-rp" --prefix-colors "cyan,red,magenta,yellow,blue,green"
scripts.build:unicorns-unite: cd games/unicorns-unite && npm run build && rm -rf ../../public/unicorns-unite-game && cp -r dist ../../public/unicorns-unite-game
scripts.dev:creator: cd games/creator-game && npm run dev
scripts.build:creator: cd games/creator-game && npm run build && rm -rf ../../public/creator-game && cp -r dist ../../public/creator-game
